eyebrow: If I Awaken in Los Angeles · Space 03 of 06
title: Five Asian Neighborhoods
summary: A wide arc of five elevated stages, one per enclave — Chinatown, Little Tokyo, Koreatown, Historic Filipinotown, Thai Town — each fronted by its real-life gateway monument. One rapper-poet moves the song along the arc; five resident dancers vocalize the chorus from their stations.
callout:
An arc of five small elevated stages fans around a central audience gathering space. One resident dancer stands on each stage throughout the entire section. A rapper-poet performs each verse from the town that verse is about, then travels along the arc to the next stage during each chorus, arriving just in time to land the next verse. Lighting isolates the active town during verses; all five light up during choruses, with accent flickers firing on each town as the lyrics name it.

No walls divide the zones. Instead, each neighborhood gets its own scenic landmark — specific picks TBD by the writer. Two of them are functionally locked in: the audience enters Space 3 by walking through the Chinatown landmark (at the first town of the song) and exits through the Thai Town landmark (at the last). Each end of the arc becomes a threshold into and out of a town.

meta.label: Cast
meta.value: Tour Guide · 1 main performer · 5 stationed dancers

plan.svg:
<svg class="plan-svg" viewBox="-80 -80 760 760" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <defs>
            <pattern id="s3grid" width="40" height="40" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
              <path d="M 40 0 L 0 0 0 40" fill="none" stroke="#1f1a16" stroke-width="0.5"></path>
            </pattern>
            <radialGradient id="audGrad" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
              <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d4a24c" stop-opacity="0.12"></stop>
              <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#d4a24c" stop-opacity="0"></stop>
            </radialGradient>
            <marker id="s3arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
              <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#d4a24c"></path>
            </marker>
            <marker id="s3arrowPerf" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
              <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#4ac6b0"></path>
            </marker>
          </defs>

          <!-- Outer warehouse hint -->
          <rect x="-80" y="-80" width="760" height="760" fill="#0a0806"></rect>

          <!-- Space 3 boundary -->
          <rect x="40" y="40" width="560" height="560" fill="url(#s3grid)" stroke="#3a2e22" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
          <text x="52" y="62" fill="#3a2e22" font-family="JetBrains Mono" font-size="11" letter-spacing="3">SPACE 03 · FIVE ASIAN NEIGHBORHOODS</text>

          <!-- Scale: 80 px = 10 ft -->
          <g transform="translate(60,560)">
            <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="80" y2="0" stroke="#a89b82" stroke-width="1.2"></line>
            <line x1="0" y1="-4" x2="0" y2="4" stroke="#a89b82"></line>
            <line x1="80" y1="-4" x2="80" y2="4" stroke="#a89b82"></line>
            <text x="40" y="-8" fill="#a89b82" font-family="JetBrains Mono" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">10 FT</text>
          </g>

          <!-- Band stage at NE corner (1/4 visible) -->
          <g>
            <circle cx="600" cy="40" r="80" fill="#1a1208" stroke="#d4a24c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.85"></circle>
            <circle cx="600" cy="40" r="40" fill="none" stroke="#d4a24c" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="3,3" opacity="0.5"></circle>
            <!-- clip indicator: only the SW quadrant visible inside Space 3 -->
            <line x1="600" y1="40" x2="520" y2="40" stroke="#d4a24c" stroke-width="0.6" stroke-dasharray="2,3" opacity="0.4"></line>
            <line x1="600" y1="40" x2="600" y2="120" stroke="#d4a24c" stroke-width="0.6" stroke-dasharray="2,3" opacity="0.4"></line>
          </g>
          <g data-draggable="" data-id="bandLabel" transform="translate(540,24)">
            <title>Band stage · shared between spaces 2–5 · 1/4 visible here</title>
            <text fill="#d4a24c" font-family="JetBrains Mono" font-size="9" letter-spacing="2">BAND STAGE ↗</text>
          </g>

          <!-- Entry from Space 2 (east wall) · through the Chinatown Gate -->
          <!-- Arrow, labels, and audience path all reposition dynamically to follow the gate -->
          <g>
            <line id="entryArrow" x1="660" y1="420" x2="590" y2="420" stroke="#d4a24c" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#s3arrow)" opacity="0.75"></line>
            <text id="entryLabel1" x="664" y="434" fill="#d4a24c" font-family="JetBrains Mono" font-size="8" letter-spacing="1.5">FROM SPACE 2</text>
            <text id="entryLabel2" x="664" y="446" fill="#d4a24c" font-family="JetBrains Mono" font-size="7" letter-spacing="1" opacity="0.75">THROUGH THE GATE</text>
          </g>

          <!-- Exit to Space 4 (north wall) · between the Apsonsi statues -->

            <ellipse cx="0" cy="10" rx="7" ry="2.5" fill="#000" opacity="0.6"></ellipse>

          <!-- Audience path hint (entry through gate → gathering → exit between statues) -->

            <path id="entryPath" d="M 555 420 Q 460 380 400 340" fill="none" stroke="#d4a24c" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-dasharray="3,4" marker-end="url(#s3arrow)"></path>
            <path id="exitPath" d="M 260 220 L 280 105" fill="none" stroke="#d4a24c" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-dasharray="3,4" marker-end="url(#s3arrow)"></path>

beats.title: Through the Chinatown landmark
beats.body: From Space 2's Courtyard, the Tour Guide gathers the audience and leads them to the east edge of Space 3. The threshold is not just a doorway — it's the Chinatown landmark itself. The audience walks through it into the space. As they emerge on the other side, the arc of five elevated stages begins to reveal itself — five dancers already in place, four more landmarks visible across the room. Warm amber wash, low house music, anticipatory.

beats.title: The reveal · five towns at once
beats.body: Audience settles in the center of the arc. All five stages visible at once — 5 dancers posed in ready positions, 5 gateway monuments behind them. Tour Guide delivers his bridge: "We're about to take a deep dive into L.A.'s international spice rack…" Then a beat drops. Lights cut to isolate Stage 1. Tour Guide exits.

beats.title: Chinatown · verse 1
beats.body: Main performer on Stage 1 — framed by the Chinatown landmark — drops the first verse. "Firecracker-poppin'-off, from the run to the jazz club… Standin in Central Plaza, under the shadow of Bruce Lee…" Chinatown dancer beside him matches the rhythm. Other four stages dark.

beats.title: Chorus → Little Tokyo · verse 2
beats.body: All five stages snap on. The 5 dancers, from their stations, chant the chorus in round — "Chinatown / J-town / K-town / Thai Town / Historic Filipino-town…" — each town's light flares when its name lands. Main performer walks along the arc from Stage 1 to Stage 2. He arrives at the Little Tokyo landmark as the chorus ends. Other stages dim. Verse 2 begins: "Taiko drums pound like the pads of a hundred pairs of feet…"

beats.title: Chorus → Koreatown · verse 3
beats.body: Second chorus lifts all five stages again, name-flickers as before. Main performer crosses to Stage 3. Koreatown landmark glows jade and rust. Verse 3: "Yo, everybody know, Koreans run LA!… Now we on 6th & St. Andrews Place…"

tags.label: All up → Stage 3 only · jade green

beats.title: Chorus → Historic Filipinotown · verse 4
beats.body: Third chorus. Main performer moves to Stage 4, framed by the Hi-Fi landmark under an amber wash. Verse 4: "Through the Gateway / Rolling down Temple Street / Now we in 'Hi-Fi' where the Filipino's meet…"

tags.label: All up → Stage 4 only · warm amber

beats.title: Chorus → Thai Town · verse 5 · the end
beats.body: Fourth and final chorus. Main performer crosses the last stretch of the arc to Stage 5 — the Thai Town landmark frames him in a gold wash. Verse 5: "I swear / That spice thick in the air / Like humidity in Bangkok…" Last line lands. Music out. Hold on the gold wash. The outro verse ("Five towns, that's the OGs…") is cut.

beats.title: Through the Thai Town landmark · exit to Space 4
beats.body: A single held breath. Tour Guide re-enters, grabs the audience, leads them north. The exit is the passage through the Thai Town landmark — whatever form the writer chooses, the structure frames the audience's passage out into Space 4 (Black LA). Entered through one town, exited through another — the whole section lived inside a shrunken Asian-American LA. The five dancers remain posed on their stages as the audience passes; lights hold on the arc; they don't leave.

locked: Arc layout with 5 elevated stages · all visible throughout
Audience enters through the Chinatown landmark (east threshold) and exits through the Thai Town landmark (north threshold)
1 resident dancer stationed on each stage for the full section
Order: Chinatown → Little Tokyo → Koreatown → Hi-Fi → Thai Town
Chorus = all 5 stages lit + name-flicker + performer walks
Verse = only active town's stage lit
Gateway monuments serve as scenic dividers, no walls
Final recap verse ("Five towns, that's the OGs…") cut
Tour Guide leads audience in from Space 2, out to Space 4
stillOpen: Landmark choice per town — TBD by writer (Chinatown landmark must allow audience to pass through · Thai Town landmark must allow audience to pass through/between)
